zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Wilkinson於1542年出生在英國貝德福爾諾迪爾時，他的父親John Wilkinson13歲，母親Susanna Jane Rigbye17歲。他於1567年9月13日與Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton在英國英格蘭貝德福爾諾迪爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1594年5月15日在英國英格蘭貝德福爾貝德福德享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Wilkinson于1542年出生在英国貝德福爾諾迪爾时，他的父亲John Wilkinson13岁，母亲Susanna Jane Rigbye17岁。他于1567年9月13日与Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton在英国英格兰貝德福爾諾迪爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1594年5月15日在英国英格兰貝德福爾貝德福德享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wilkinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic (‘son of Wilkin’) from Wilkin . Compare Wilkerson .

variants.name: Wilkin
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Wilkin, a pet form of William introduced to England and Scotland by Flemings and Picards after the Norman Conquest.

variants.name: Wilkerson
meanings: English (East Anglia and South East Midlands): from Middle English Wilkeson, a shortened form of Wilkinson , ‘son of Wilkin or young William’. The -r- is intrusive.

variants.name: Wilkison
meanings: English and Scottish: shortened form of Wilkinson or a variant of Wilkieson from the medieval personal name Wilky + -son, meaning ‘son of Wilky’. Compare Wilkie 1.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Wilkinson was born in 1542, in Northill, Bedfordshire, England, his father, John Wilkinson, was 13 and his mother, Susanna Jane Rigbye, was 17. He married Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton on 13 September 1567, in Northill, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 15 May 1594, in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Wilkinson est né en 1542, à Northill, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Wilkinson, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Susanna Jane Rigbye, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton le 13 septembre 1567, à Northill, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 15 mai 1594, à Bedford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Wilkinson 1542 in Northill, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Wilkinson 13 und seine Mutter Susanna Jane Rigbye 17. Er hat am 13. September 1567 in Northill, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Mai 1594 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Wilkinson è nato il nel 1542 nel Northill, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, John Wilkinson, aveva 13 anni e il suo madre, Susanna Jane Rigbye, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton il 13 settembre 1567, nel Northill, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 15 maggio 1594, nel Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Wilkinsonが1542年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアノースイルで生まれた時，父John Wilkinsonは13歳，母Susanna Jane Rigbyeは17歳であった。1567年9月13日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアノースイルでElizabeth Agnetae Wheatonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1594年5月15日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアベドフォードで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Wilkinson(이)가 1542년 영국 베드퍼드실르 노르스이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wilkinson(은)는 13세였고, 그의 어머니 Susanna Jane Rigbye(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1567년 9월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 노르스이에서 Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1594년 5월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 베드퍼드에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Wilkinson nasceu em 1542, em Northill, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Wilkinson, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Susanna Jane Rigbye, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton em 13 de setembro de 1567, em Northill, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de maio de 1594, em Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Wilkinson родился в 1542 г. в местности нортилл, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Wilkinson было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Susanna Jane Rigbye, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton 13 сентября 1567 г. в местности нортилл, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 15 мая 1594 г. в местности бедфорд, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Wilkinson nació en 1542, en Northill, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Wilkinson, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Susanna Jane Rigbye, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton el 13 de septiembre de 1567, en Northill, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 15 de mayo de 1594, en Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años.
